strengths: Extensive fullstack experience with TypeScript, React, and Node.js across multiple production systems
Proven ability to own end-to-end projects, including infrastructure (Kubernetes, AWS CDK) and API integrations
Strong track record of open-source contributions and technical teaching, indicating communication and learning agility
concerns: Job titles (e.g., Staff Software Engineer) appear inflated relative to junior/mid-level role expectations
Limited explicit mention of PostgreSQL or Nest.js — key required technologies — despite broad stack exposure
German language proficiency is only basic, while high on-site presence in Berlin is required
response.justification: The candidate brings deep, diverse fullstack expertise with TypeScript and modern web architectures, alongside strong infrastructure and open-source contributions, but his senior job titles, lack of explicit PostgreSQL/Nest.js experience, and limited German proficiency raise concerns about role alignment and on-site integration.
